justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including specific times and date ranges.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed close alternatives and remembered previous rejections, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made appropriate suggestions without any unnecessary turns or redundant queries.

justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently understood and processed all temporal expressions, including specific dates and times, and adjusted search parameters accordingly.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative dates and times when the user's initial requests were unavailable, and successfully navigated the user's preferences to find a suitable slot.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and made appropriate API calls without any redundant questions or turns.
